The Jimi He drop Red House is allegedly where he lived during his relatively short time on this planet. An amazing guy and a legend.

I gave 5 Stars for the 60th years of SF for hippies. That spirit still scares the streets. 
But the Jimi Hendrix house is a disappointment. There are shops and more. 
Still suspicious that Hendrix lives here.
But it’s amazing to smell the air on that street and bring those days to life.
